# ppxml2db Python runtime dependencies.
#
# Production deploys install lxml via Alpine apk (`py3-lxml`) — see Dockerfile
# Stage 4. This file is the source of truth for the upstream contract and
# enables pip-based installs for non-Docker dev environments:
#     pip install -r packages/api/vendor/requirements.txt
#
# All other imports in this directory are Python stdlib (sqlite3, argparse,
# json, logging, os.path, sys, collections, pprint) — no pip install needed.

lxml>=5.0.0,<6.0.0
